title.en: Use Up-to-Date and Trusted Third-Party Software Components

prose.en: Use up-to-date and trusted third-party software components. When possible, choose established and proven frameworks and libraries that provide adequate security. Acquire these components from trusted sources or evaluate the software for vulnerabilities before use.
Up-to-date and trusted third-party software components are used.
Established and proven frameworks and libraries are chosen that provide adequate security, when possible.
Components are acquired from trusted sources or software is evaluated for vulnerabilities before use.
